themes: The backlog is dominated by Managers across multi-location franchise, residential, fitness, and hospitality brands, signaling a broad need to reduce manual effort in day-to-day location reporting and workflow management.

Several accounts — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, and Anytime Fitness — appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times, suggesting deep, unresolved pain points that may require coordinated account-level attention.

Wait times range from 6 to 358 days with a heavy concentration beyond 100 days, indicating a systemic follow-up gap that risks eroding trust and retention across a significant portion of the customer base.
